---
name: Task/Chore
about: Track development tasks, refactoring, or technical debt
title: '[TASK] '
labels: task, chore
assignees: ''
---

## 📋 Task Description

### Overview
<!-- Clear description of the task to be completed -->

### Context
<!-- Why is this task needed? What problem does it solve? -->

### Task Type
<!-- Select one -->
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Technical Debt
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Configuration
- [ ] Tooling/DevOps
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Performance Optimization
- [ ] Security Enhancement
- [ ] Dependency Update
- [ ] Other: ___________

### Sprint Assignment
**Sprint**: [Sprint 1 / Sprint 2 / Sprint 3 / Backlog]
**Epic**: [Epic name, if applicable]

### Acceptance Criteria
<!-- What needs to be done for this task to be complete? -->

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

### Implementation Notes
<!-- Technical details, approaches, or considerations -->

### Dependencies
<!-- Any other tasks, PRs, or blockers? -->

- Depends on: #issue_number
- Blocks: #issue_number

### Definition of Done
<!-- Checklist for completion -->

- [ ] Code changes implemented
- [ ] Tests written/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Code reviewed & approved
- [ ] Merged to main branch
- [ ] Deployed to staging/production

### Estimated Effort
**Story Points**: [1 / 2 / 3 / 5 / 8 / 13]
**Time Estimate**: [e.g., 2 hours, 1 day, 3 days]

### Additional Context
<!-- Any other relevant information -->

---

**For GrowPath Team Use:**
- [ ] Reviewed & prioritized
- [ ] Assigned to developer
- [ ] In progress
- [ ] Code review completed
- [ ] Deployed
